PropertyTypes.Caption: Item click toggles selection
PropertyTypes.Description: Defines item selection behavior.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Filter section
PropertyTypes.Description: Assistive technology will read this upon reaching a filtering or sorting section.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Empty message
PropertyTypes.Description: Assistive technology will read this upon reaching an empty message section.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Content description
PropertyTypes.Description: Assistive technology will read this upon reaching gallery.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Automatic options
PropertyTypes.Description: Show options based on the references or the enumeration values and captions.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Default value
PropertyTypes.Description: Empty option caption will be shown by default or if configured default value matches none of the options

PropertyTypes.Caption: Saved attribute
PropertyTypes.Description: Attribute used to store the last value of the filter. Associations are not supported.

PropertyTypes.Caption: On change
PropertyTypes.Description: Action to be triggered when the value or filter changes.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Input caption
PropertyTypes.Description: Assistive technology will read this upon reaching the input element.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Saved attribute
PropertyTypes.Description: Attribute used to store the last value of the filter.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Saved start date attribute
PropertyTypes.Description: Attribute used to store the last value of the start date filter.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Saved end date attribute
PropertyTypes.Description: Attribute used to store the last value of the end date filter.

PropertyTypes.Caption: On change
PropertyTypes.Description: Action to be triggered when the value or filter changes.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Comparison button caption
PropertyTypes.Description: Assistive technology will read this upon reaching the comparison button that triggers the filter type drop-down menu.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Calendar button caption
PropertyTypes.Description: Assistive technology will read this upon reaching the button that triggers the calendar.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Input caption
PropertyTypes.Description: Assistive technology will read this upon reaching the input element.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Apply after (ms)
PropertyTypes.Description: Wait this period before applying then change(s) to the filter

PropertyTypes.Caption: Saved attribute
PropertyTypes.Description: Attribute used to store the last value of the filter.

PropertyTypes.Caption: On change
PropertyTypes.Description: Action to be triggered when the value or filter changes.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Comparison button caption
PropertyTypes.Description: Assistive technology will read this upon reaching the comparison button that triggers the filter type drop-down menu.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Input caption
PropertyTypes.Description: Assistive technology will read this upon reaching the input element.
